stadium.name: The Sun-Baked Bowl
stadium.description: A simple, deep bowl dug from clay and sandstone on the edge of a caravan oasis. The heat is oppressive, and the 'stands' are just blankets laid on the sun-baked dunes.

stats.pregame_ritual: Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Smelling a piece of burnt wood from a campfire.
Methodically tearing a large leaf into tiny, identical pieces.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Humming a tune they believe only they know.
Tugging on their left earlobe three times.
Shaving one half of their mustache for important games.
Consulting a folk rhyme about the weather to predict the game's outcome.
Sticking a specific type of feather in their helmet's plume.
Organizing a small betting pool on who will score first.
Dipping their hands in a bucket of ice-cold well water.

awayTeam.name: The Confluence Captains
awayTeam.sponsor: The Guild of the Black Sky

stadium.name: The Glowstone Terrace
stadium.description: A massive, opulent stadium built on one of the city's main terraces, carved directly into the mountainside. The field is famously paved with polished Glowstone, and the stands overlook the bustling Confluence Market and the ongoing construction of the Guild's Skyport.

stats.pregame_ritual: Doing a terrible, clumsy dance to 'loosen the joints'.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Arm-wrestling the player who plays the same position on their team.
Speaking only in rhymes for the hour before the game.
Rubbing the Trollball on their armpits for 'grip'.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Going over the game plan drawn in the dirt with the team captain.
Covering their forearms in a sticky tree sap for 'grip'.
Eating a dandelion, stem and all.
Headbutting their own team's goal post (gently).

preGame:
Folks of Osterra, gather 'round! Dust off your ceremonial tunics and grab a tankard, because tonight, on the glorious Glowstone Terrace, we witness a clash of titans in this Grand Finals Bracket Reset! The Confluence Captains, sponsored by the esteemed Guild of the Black Sky, square off against the mighty Desert Spectres! With the Market Day crowds roaring and the Mountain Wind whipping down from the World's Spine Mountains, this contest promises to be a grueling, glorious spectacle! The very Glowstone underfoot seems to shimmer with anticipation, adding an extra layer of dazzling danger to the fray!

Observe the Captains! We have Ladew Evelina, who prepares by chugging a raw egg, shell and all—a veritable baptism by avian delight! And Richia Pazit, who gently headbutts their own goal post, a sign of focused, controlled mayhem! Meanwhile, on the desert side, the Spectres are prepping with a vengeance! Fidellia Mozelle takes a deep whiff of burnt wood, perhaps summoning the very fires of the Great Desert! And Steve, bless their competitive heart, is organizing a betting pool before the whistle even blows! The sheer ritualistic dedication is what makes Trollball the greatest sport under the sun!

While we cheer for the Confluence Captains, the shining beacon of victory in my eyes, let us not forget the Desert Spectres! They bring the oppressive heat and the sands of doom with them, but I sense destiny favors the heroes of Confluence! Prepare yourselves, citizens, for a battle of grit, glory, and glorious, chaotic violence!
postGame:
By the gods of the Everwar, what a slugfest! What a monumental display of sheer, unadulterated Trollball fury! The Confluence Captains have done it! They have seized this grueling, sand-swept encounter and marched them to victory! The Desert Spectres put up a valiant, dusty fight, battling the relentless heat and blinding sandstorm that swept across The Glowstone Terrace, but the Captains proved too mighty! 

From the opening snap, the violence was breathtaking! Angelita Darce started the onslaught, but the Spectres immediately hammered back, with Belding Chloe taking a mighty tackle from Shelman McQuoid—and taking a chunk out of their resolve! Deach Sharlene, recovering quickly with the aid of Kantor Langill, marched forward, only to be clipped and then tackled again! The midfield became a churning maelstrom of warriors, with Behl Berstine, O'Conner Maighdlin, and Carnahan Laud all exchanging bone-jarring collisions!

Halftime brought a brief, much-needed respite, allowing every brave soul to recover from their bruising, but the second half was pure, unadulterated carnage! The Spectres tried to answer with sheer power, but the Captains answered with tactical brilliance! The moment of destiny arrived when Stephan Lisk found the elusive O'Conner Maighdlin, who powered through the defensive scrum and dunked the beast into the goal! That, my friends, was a touchdown of thunder! The final bell rang, and the Confluence Captains triumphantly claim the victory, 1 to 0!

And what a reward for such stellar athleticism! With the bar officially open, I trust every brave warrior—and I'm looking at you, rich, slightly tipsy Richia Pazit—is draining those tankards! The Desert Spectres might have endured the heat and the dehydration, but the Captains endured the entire glorious ordeal! Let's cheer for the Captains! May their glory continue to shine brighter than the Glowstone itself! Hooray for the Captains!
